languages.text: "Мы не можем бросить все и мчаться на Футфол. Займусь этим позже".
"We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."
languages.original_text: "Мы не можем бросить все и мчаться на Футфол. Займусь этим позже".

traits.locale_text: "We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."
"We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."
"We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."

languages.text: 「ただ、すべてを放り出してフットフォールに急ぐわけにはいかない。私はこの件を処理する。」
languages.original_text: "We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."

traits.locale_text: 「ただ、すべてを放り出してフットフォールに急ぐわけにはいかない。私はこの件を処理する。」

languages.text: «No podemos dejar todo para ir a Paso. Me ocuparé de esto».
languages.original_text: "We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."

traits.locale_text: «No podemos dejar todo para ir a Paso. Me ocuparé de esto».

languages.text: "Wir können nicht alles liegen und stehen lassen und nach Footfall fliegen. Ich kümmere mich darum."
languages.original_text: "We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."

traits.locale_text: "Wir können nicht alles liegen und stehen lassen und nach Footfall fliegen. Ich kümmere mich darum."

languages.text: « Nous ne pouvons pas tout laisser en plan pour nous précipiter à Castel. Je m'en tiendrai à mon programme. »
languages.original_text: "We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."

traits.locale_text: « Nous ne pouvons pas tout laisser en plan pour nous précipiter à Castel. Je m'en tiendrai à mon programme. »

languages.text: “抛下一切贸然赶往落脚港并不可取。这件事我会亲自处理。”
languages.original_text: "We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."

traits.locale_text: “抛下一切贸然赶往落脚港并不可取。这件事我会亲自处理。”

languages.text: "Öylece her şeyi bırakıp Binliman'a gitmeliyiz. Bu meseleyle bizzat ilgileneceğim."
languages.original_text: "We cannot simply drop everything and hare off to Footfall. I will attend to this."

traits.locale_text: "Öylece her şeyi bırakıp Binliman'a gitmeliyiz. Bu meseleyle bizzat ilgileneceğim."
